title: senecio lambertii
intro: Senecio lambertii, also known as lambert's ragwort or lambert's groundsel, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is primarily used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of Senecio lambertii include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
